[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2025-12-03
[TITLE]: Dog Walker Witnesses A Crate Being Thrown From Van With An Entire Family Inside - The Dodo
[METADATA/INTRO]: Dog Walker Witnesses A Crate Being Thrown From Van With An Entire Family Inside They were so scared 💔...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Dog Walker Witnesses A Crate Being Thrown From Van With An Entire Family Inside 
 They were so scared 💔 
 A woman in Cheshire, England, was out walking her dog one morning when she saw a van come skidding to a halt. She wondered what was going on, then watched as someone inside the van tossed out a dog crate and drove away. Shocked, she rushed toward the crate and found a little family huddled up inside. 
 There were five black cats inside the crate, including two kittens, and all of them were terrified. The crate had landed in some bushes in an alleyway, and the woman immediately retrieved it and took the cats home. She then contacted the RSPCA, who couldn’t believe what the poor cats had gone through.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: All of the dogs were the same breed, King Charles Spaniels. 
 The Pierce County Sheriff's Office announced today that 68 dogs were seized from a dog breeder's home in the Peninsula... 
 Posted by Louie Tran on Tuesday, August 13, 2024 
 Investigators said the conditions were so bad that 48 dogs had to be shaved since many of them were covered in dirt and their own waste. 
 Cappetto said, “It’s not humane. You wouldn’t do this to a family member of your own.” 
 “When you go into a double-wide trailer like that and there’s just cages and cages of dogs and crates, and cages that are too small for them to even get up and move around. And you have pregnant dogs wandering around, not getting the care they need. Sick dogs in corners transferring the Parvo disease to other dogs,” Cappetto said.
